title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIO BALANTOY, MUNICIPALITY OF BALBALAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE

chunks.text:
H. No. 853 / 65 OG No. 3, 521 (January 20, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4778, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO BALANTOY, MUNICIPALITY OF BALBALAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sitios Balantoy, Ligayan, Kilayon, Bolo and Nawoy, Municipality of Balbalan, Mountain Province, are constituted into a barrio, to be known as Barrio Balantoy of said municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
